titleStmt.title: SII 7.485: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 485. (A.R. No. 269 of 1901). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE TYAGARAJASVAMIN TEMPLE AT TIRUVARUR, NEGAPATAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaṉṉu patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuṉ cey tavattāl parutivaḻit toṉṟi neṭumā livaneṉac cuṭarmuṭi cūṭi Irunilamakaḷai Urimaiyiṟ puṇarntu tirumakaḷ paṇaimulaic ceñcān taḷaintu parumaṇi mārvam paṉivarai nikaṟpa jayamakaḷ ceḻuñcantaṉac cuvaṭṭāl puya mirukayilaip poruppeṉat tonṟi nāmakaḷ tāṉum Eṅkomakaḷ cevvāyp pavaḷacceyoḷip paṭaittaṉa niyāneṉat tavaḷanaṉṉiṟan taṉittoṭai pukaḻmakaḷ ḻunāḷilum Orukuṭai nilavum porupaṭait tikiri veyiluṅ karuṅkali Iruḷiṉait turappa niṭu pallūḻi Eḻkaṭaṟpuṟattiṉuṅ koṭāc centaṉi
kko liṉitulāva mīṉamuñ cilaiyuñ citaittu vāṉuyarp poṉṉeṭu meruvil puli viṟṟiruppa Umpariyāṉai Oreṭṭiṉukkun tampameṉṉat taṉittaṉi ticaitoṟum vicaiyasta mpam niṟppa pacipakaiyāṉatu titu nīṅka maṉṉuyir taḻaippa maṉuvāṟu viḷaṅka mātavar tavamu maṅkaiyar kaṟpum Ātiantaṇa rā kutik kaṉalu miteḻu koṇṭal vīcu taṇpuṉalu metiṉil vaḷaṉuñ cāti Oḻukkamum nīti Aṟamum piṟaḻātu nikaḻap pā ḷaikkaimāvu mallatu vaṉṟaḷaippaṭutal kaṉaviluṅ kāṇṭaṟ kariteṉa varuntip puṭaiyiṉum palveṟu puḷḷiṉu mallatu ciṟaiyeṉappaṭuta liṉṟi ni
ṟaiperuñ celvamo ṭavaṉivāḻap pallavar teluṅkar māḷuvar kaliṅkar kocalar kaṉṉaṭar kaṭārar teṉṉar ceralar ciṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cetikar tirikattar vaṅka raṅkar vattavar mattirar kaṅkar coṉakar kaikaiyar jiṉareṉ ṟaṟaikaḻalventarum Allāvaraicarum muṟaimaiyil varinta tiṟai kuṇarn tiṟaiñca Ampoṉmalaṟ koṭic cempiyaṉkiḻānaṭi Orumaruṅ kuṭaṉamarn tiruppa Aruḷpuri cimaiyappoṟkoṭṭimaiyappāvaiyuñ civanumpolap puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷavan tirumaṇimārvat taruḷ muḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉa Uṭaṉiruppac cempoṉ vīrasi ṅkājaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum
vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 7Āvatu tiruvāruruṭaiyār śrīmulattāṉamuṭaiyār koyilil Eḻuntaruḷiirukkum Āḷuṭaiyanampikkum paravainācciyārkkum Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyiliyāka paḻampeyarum muṉ ṉiṟai kaṭṭinapaṭiyun tavirntu yāṇṭu 7vatu mutal Aṉapāyanallūreṉṉun tirunāmattāl Ōrurāyk kūṭiṉa keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu marukalnāṭṭut tiruvātiraimaṅkalam � Eṟiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa nilam 2 I� kiḻakku I-ṉāl ḷa 100 2- ḷa � Ivvūroṭuṅkūṭa Oṭṭi Iṟuttu varukiṟa Āmur � Eṟu nilam Uṭpaṭa nilam 10 2 ntama� kiḻakkukha- ṉāl I 5 100 10 1- ḷa � Āka
(āka) nilam 10 5kha� kiḻakku n=ta- ṉāl I 6 100 10 3- ḷa � Ippaṭi tavira yāṇṭu 7vatu mutal veli 1- kku I 100- ḷa Āka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ I 1000 5 100 3 10 2- �-ṉāl 10-6 Ākki I 9 100 10 1-� n=ta- m yāṇṭu 10 2vatumutal Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa Inṉāṭṭut tevatāṉamāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻanallūrniṉṟum veṟu piṟinta Araṅkamaṅkalam muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻampeyarum muṉṉiṟai kaṭṭinapaṭiyun tavirntu tāṉavinotanallū(r)reṉṉun tirunāmattāl nilam 10 6 I � 4�- ṉāl I 7 100 6 10 2- ḷa Ippaṭi tavira veli 1- kku I 100- ḷa Āka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ I 1000 6 100 5 10 8- ḷa Uṅakiḻakku ṉāl 10-6 Ākki ḷa 9 100 9 10 6 U ka 3 ṅa3� .. Āka nilam 3 10 1 �- ṉāl Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ pattāṟā
kki ḷa 1000 9 100 10 4- ḷa� 5nta- ṉāl Ūrkkālākki I �8 100 2 10 8- ḷa9 ṅa � . kku nivantaṅkaṭṭuppaṭi Āḷuṭaiyanampikkum paravainācciyāṟkum Amutukku sa nti 4- kku ḷ 1- kku poṉakappaḻa� 9 ṅa6va�- m parup kkum m palavaṟkattu kaṟiyamutu niṟai 100 9 10 2- lam Uppamutu � I-m kaṭuku �nta�- m miḷaku n=ta 1 va- m cira(m)kam 1 � va-m nāṭaṉmañcaḷ va-lam māṅkāyvaṟṟal 10 2- lam puḷi niṟai 1 lai-m ciraiteṅkāy 3- m karuvāḻaippaḻam 10 2- m caṟkarai niṟai 9- lai-m neyamutu 3nta I�-m tayiramutu 3�- m Uppiñci �lam celpālukku la 2� kaṇṭacaṟkarai niṟai �-lam Aṭaikkāyamutu
pākku 4 10- m Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu 1- m tayilam �m citāri 1 � ḷa kūṭṭa cantaṉam � la-m Akil � ma� lam neriyāsa m �-m teṉ na�-m cārttiyaruḷa cāntu � m tirununtāviḷakku 2- kku Er Un=ta- m sa ntiviḷakku 2 10 3- kku Er Un=ta m Āka Er �m pamutukku Amutupaṭikku pūricceral �4 ḷ caṟkarai niṟai 2 100- lam ciraiteṅkāy 5 10 miḷaku Un=ta cīrakam n=ta karumpu 4 10- m pākku 2 10 paṟṟu tiruvamutukku poṉakappa ḻ� 9 paruppu � kaṟi niṟai 100 2 10 8- lam Uppu � miḷaku n=ta cīrakam 1- ceviṭu nāṭaṉmañcaḷ kha- lam ney � ciraiteṅkāy 1 caṟkarai niṟai 2- lam karuvāḻaippaḻam 4 tayir � pākku 3 10 2 paṟṟu nta � tirukkāttikaittirunāḷaikku Amutupaṭikku pūriavalamutu �
caṟkarai niṟai 50- lam miḷaku n=ta cīrakam � ciraiteṅkāy 2 10 pākku 2 10 paṟṟu I tiruamutukku poṉakappaḻa� 1 paruppu � kaṟi niṟai 100 2 10 8- lam Uppu � miḷaku n=ta cirakam 1- ceviṭu nāṭaṉmañcaḷ va-lam ney � ciraiteṅkāy 1 caṟkarai niṟai 2- lam tayir � karuvāḻai ṟṟu nta� tirumārkaḻit tiruvātiraittirunāḷaikku Amutupaṭikku poṉakappaḻa� paruppu � pāl poṉakattukku ponakappaḻa� Uṅa-pāl ṅau� ney n=ta2- ceviṭui kaṟi niṟai 100 9 10 2- lam Uppu � miḷaku n=ta cīrakam 1- ceviṭe kāl nāṭaṉmañcaḷ kha- lam teṅkāy 2 porikkaṟiamutukku ney � Amutupaṭikku ney n=ta caṟkarai niṟai 3- lam karuvāḻaippaḻam 6 tayir � Uppiñci �-lam Appavamutukku poṉakappaḻa� U-ḷa caṟkarai niṟai 7 100 6 10 8- lam
ney 2 10 4� miḷaku � cirakam n=ta pākku 100 paṟṟu 2 I tayilam � ceviṭu citāri � Eṇṇai � kaikkoṟṟup peṟuvārkku ḷ 1- kku Aṟcaṉai paṇṇuvāṉ Oruvaṉukku ḷa 3 ṅa kācu 3 tirupparicārakap per 3- varkku ḷa� kācu 1 poṟpaṇṭāramum maṭivaḷavappaṇṭāramuñ ceyvāṉ Oruvaṉukku kācu 1 tiruppūmaṇṭapattāḷ Oruvaṉukku I� kācu 2 tirunantavaṉamuñ ceytu Eḻuntaruḷun tirunāḷkaḷil tiruppaḷḷittoṅkalum Eṭukkum per 4- varkku I 2 10 1 koyiṟ kaṇakkaṉukku ḷa ṅa kācu 1 tirumaṭaippaḷḷik kucavaṟkku ḷa ṅakkū tirupparicaṭṭam vāṭṭum vaṇṇattāṉukku ḷa ṅa tirumaṭaippaḷḷikku viṟakukoṇṭiṭuvār per 2- varkku ḷa �- m putteccum yeṟukkariciyum peṟukkuvāḷ Oruttikku ḷa 6� caṅku kāḷamum tiṟuccaṉṉamum Ūtuvār pe
r Iruvaṟku Ī Eḻuntaruḷuntirunāḷ Amāvācittirunāḷ 10 2- m caṅkarāntittirunāḷ 8- m viṣu vayaṉattirunāḷ 4- m kirāṇattirunāḷ 2- m tirumārkaḻittiruvātirait tirunāḷ 1- m taippūcattirunāḷ 1- m cittiraic cittiraittirunāḷ tiruttamaṉakañ cārttiaruḷun tirunāḷ 1- m Āṭippūrat tirunāḷ 1- m Āvaṇiaviṭṭattirunāḷ 1- m pavittirañ cārttiaruḷun tirunāḷ 1- m Aippacic cataiyattirunāḷil Eḻuntaruḷuntirunāḷ 6- m tiruppaṅkuṉi Uttirattirunāḷaikku tirukkoṭiēṟṟukku tirumuḷaiccārtta Eḻuntaruḷuntirunāḷ 1- m tirttattukkut tirumuḷaic cārtta Eḻuttaruḷun tirunāḷ 1- m tirunāḷil Eḻuntaruḷuntirunāḷ 10 m tiruvāṭit tirunāḷil Eḻuntaruḷun tirunāḷ 6 m Ākat tirunāḷ 5 10 6- kku Eḻuntaruḷi vikkum śrīpātantāṅkuvār per 8- markku ḷ 1- kku ḷa-3 ḷa Āka
ḷa 100 6 10 8- ḷam Ituviḻukkāṭu ḷ 1- kku ḷa �3n ta Āka nivantakkāṟar per 2 10 6varkku ḷ 1- kku ḷa 3 ḷa6�3nta Itil tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku viṭṭuc coṟṟaṭaippukku Uṭalām poṉakappaḻa� 1 ṅa6� poṉakattukku paruppu � Ākapparuppuḷpaṭa �1 Uṅa-ṉāl Iraṭṭi ḷa 1- ḷ nikki I 2 ḷa6 �nta Āka ḷ 3 100 6 10- kku I 7 100 4 10 5- ḷa 1- Āṭṭaikku puṭavaimutal kācu 10 tirupparicaṭṭattukkum tiruppāvāṭaikkum kācu 10 tirumaṭaippaḷḷikku viṟaku koḷḷak kācu 8kha3� tiruvaṇukkaṉaḻivu corpili koḷḷak kācu 3 .... Ikkoyil Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkum Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṟkum tirunāvukkaracutevarkkum veṇṭum Aṟcaṉaikaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Aṟcanāpoka Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilattukku muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻampeyarum muṉ Iṟai
kaṭṭiṉapaṭiyun tavirntu 10 2Āvatu pacāṉmutal Aṟcanāpoka Iṟaiili Iṭṭa keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu marukalnāṭṭu kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻanallūrāṉa civapātacekaranallūr nilam 2 10 6kha� kiḻakku 3�- ṉāl ḷā2 100 10 4- ḷa 1 Uṅa niccayitta I 12 100 10 3 ḷa2 10 1 ṅam 7Āvatu niccayitta I 1000 3 100 6 ḷa 1 Uṅa� Ippaṭi tavira 10 2Āvatu pacāṉ mutal veḷi 1- kku I 100- ḷa Āka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ I 2 1000 6 100 4 10- ḷa �nta ṉāl 10-6 Ākki I 1000 5 100 8 10 4- ḷa� 6�2nta Itil Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyārkku Iṟukkum nilam 10 6va � kiḻakku �-ṉāl ḷa 9 100 8 10 4 ka-ḷa ka 6�2nta- ṉāl Ūrkkālākkiḷa 1000 9 100 6 10 8- ḷa 2 10 1 ṅa Inivantakkaṭṭuppaṭi sa nti 3- kku ḷ1- kku poṉakappaḻa� paruppamutu 3�2nta muḷaippayaṟṟukkup
payaṟu � I kaṟiamutu niṟai 100 10 2- la Uppamutu � miḷakamutu � I cirakam mukkāle� nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �-la māṅkāyvaṟṟal � puḷiniṟai 1 �ciraiteṅkāy 2 karuvāḻaippaḻam 7 caṟkarai niṟai 5- lam neyamutu nta�3�nta taiyiramutu � Uppiñci ṅatma la pālamutu 4� Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 3 10 Ilaiamutu paṟṟu n=ta tayilam � citāri mukkāl kūṭṭacantaṉam �la Akil 4 mā� kiḻakku Ila neriyā[ sa m] kūsa teṉ �i tirununtāviḷakku 2- kku Eṇṇai � santi viḷakku 10 2- kku Eṇṇai � Āka Eṇṇai 3nta ciṟapput tirunāḷ tirupputiyutamutukku pūricceral � caṟkarai niṟai 100- la ciraiteṅkāy 2 10 5 miḷakamutu n=ta cirakam �
karumpu 2 10 Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 10 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu kha tiruvamutukku poṉakappaḻa�paruppamutu � kaṟiyamutu niṟai 6 10 4- la Uppamutu � miḷakamutu � cirakam I � nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �-la neyyamutu n=ta ciraiteṅkāy 5 caṟkarai niṟai 1- la karuvāḻaippaḻam 2 tayiramutu � Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 10 6 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu kha� tirukkārttikaittirunāḷaikku pūriavalamutu 1- ḷa caṟkarai niṟai 2 10 5- la miḷakamutu � cirakam 2� ciraiteṅkāy 10 Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 10 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu � tiruvamutukku poṉakappaḻa� paruppamutu � kaṟiyamutu niṟai 6 10 4- la Uppamutu � miḷakamutu � cirakam I� nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �-la neyyamutu n=ta ciraiteṅkāy 5 caṟkarai niṟai 1- la
tayiramutu � karuvāḻaippaḻam 10 2 Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 10 6 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu � tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai � Aippikaiccataiyattirunāḷil Eḻuntaruḷum tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭikku poṉakappaḻa� ṅa pālpoṉakattukku ponakappaḻa� ṅa paruppamutu ṅa pālamutu 10 6� tiruvamutākka ney � kaṟiyamutu niṟai 9 10 6- la paruppamutu 2 nta Uppamutu 3nta miḷakamutu � cirakam I� nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �-la teṅkāy 1 porikkaṟiyamutukku ney 2� I Amutupaṭikku neyḷu caṟkarai niṟai 1- la karuvāḻappaḻam 3 tayiramutu � Uppiñci �-la Appamutukku poṉakappaḻa� 1- ḷa caṟkarai niṟai 3 100 8 10 4- la neyyamutu 10 2 � miḷaka mutu � cirakam � karuvāḻaippaḻam 100 teṅkāy [5 10]
Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 5 10 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu kava tayilam � citāri 1� tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai n=ta tiruppaṅkūṉi Uttirattirunāḷil Eḻuntaruḷuntirunāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭikku poṉakappaḻa� pālpoṉakattukku poṉakappaḻa� paruppamutu � pālamutu 1 tiruvamutākka ney nta2� I kaṟiyamutu niṟai 100 9 10 2- la kaṟiyamutukku paruppamutu � Uppamutu � miḷakamutu n=ta cirakam 1�va nāṭaṉmañcaḷ va-la teṅkāy 2 porikkaṟiyamutukku ney � Amutupaṭikku ney n=ta caṟkarai niṟai 3- la karuvāḻaippaḻam 6 tayiramutu 2� Uppiñci [�-la] Appamutukku poṉakappaḻa� 2- ḷa caṟkarai niṟai 7 100 6 10 8- la neyyamutu 2 10 4 � miḷakamutu � cirakam n=ta karuvāḻaippaḻam 2 100
teṅkāy 100 pilāppaḻam 10 Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 100 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu 2 I tayilam � citāri 4� tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai ttiru Āṭittiruvātiraittirunāḷil Eḻuntaruḷun tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭikku poṉakappaḻa� pālapoṉakattukku poṉakappaḻa� paruppamutu � pālamutu 10 6� tiruvamutākka ney � kaṟiyamutu niṟai 9 10 6- la kaṟiyamutukku paruppamutu 2nta Uppamutu � miḷakamutu � cirakam I� nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �-la teṅkāy 1 porikkaṟiyamutukku ney 2� I Amutupaṭikku neyyamutu � caṟkarai niṟai 1- la karuvāḻaippaḻam 3 tayiramutu � Uppiñci �ma- la Appamutukku poṉakappaḻa� 1- ḷa caṟkarai niṟai 3 100 8 10 4- la neyyamutu 10 2� miḷakamutu � cirakam 2nta karuvāḻaippaḻam 100
teṅkāy 5 10 pilāppaḻam 5 Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 5 10 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu kava tayilam � citāri 1� tiruviḷakku Eṇ koṟṟuppeṟuvārkkuḷ 1- kku Aṟcaṉaipaṇṇuvān Oruvaṉukku I� puṭavaimutal kācu 3 Itil tirunāvukkaraicutevar koyilil viṭum I� kācu 1 I nikki I ṅa4� kācu 1 I tirupparikārikaḷ per Iruvarkku I 1 kācu 2 koyiṟkaṇakkaṉukku I 4� kācu I tirumaṭaippaḷḷikku kalamiṭuṅ kucavarkku I 4� kācukku viṟakukoṇṭiṭuvāṉukku I ṅa peṟukkarici peṟukkip paruppamutuḷ teyppāḷukku I 6� tirupparicaṭṭam vāṭṭum vaṇṇattāṉukku I� Āka kācu 4 ḷa2 10 4� Itil tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku viṭṭu coṟṟaiṭaippukku Uṭalām poṉakappaḻa� paruppamutu � Āka paruppuṭpaṭa coṟṟaṭaippukku celavāma�
ṉāl ṭṭi I 1 � nikki kācu 4 I ṅa4 � tirumaṭaippaḷḷikku viṟaku koḷḷa kācu 5vaḍa tiruppaḷḷinirpparavukkum tirunamanikaikku ti ṅkoḷḷa ciṟapput tirunāṭkaḷi leḻuntaruḷuvikkum śrīpātantāṅkuvārkku I 10- ḷ ....ikkoyilil Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkun tirunāvukkaraicutevaṟkku Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻanallūrāṉa civapātacekaranallūr nilam- 10- liṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ pattāṟākki I 6 100 ḷa-ṉāl Ūrkālākki I 1000 2 100- ḷa-kku nivantaṅ kaṭṭiṉapaṭi Amutupaṭikku santi 3- kku ḷ 1- kku poṉakappaḻa� ṅa kaṟiyamutukku paruppamutu � muḷaippayaṟṟukku payaṟu �i palavaṟkattu kaṟiyamutu niṟai 9 10 6- la Uppamutu n=ta miḷakamutu � cirakam nta� nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �-la māṅkāyvaṟṟal 1 puḷiyamutu niṟai 2va- la ciraiteṅkāy 1 I
karuvāḻaippaḻam 3 caṟkarai nilam 2 I�-la neyyamutu ntā� tayiramutu � Uppi(i)ñci�la Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 3 10 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu n=ta tayilam � santi viḷakku 10 2- kku Eṇṇai n=ta ciṟapputti
runāḷ tirupputiyitamutukku pū(r)riccerala� 1- ḷa caṟkarai niṟai 5 10- la ciraiteṅkāy 10 3 miḷakamutu � cirakam 2� I karumpu 10 Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 5 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu � tiruvamutukku poṉakappaḻa� ṅa
paruppamutu 2 nta kariyamutu nilam 3 10 2- la Uppamutu n=ta miḷakamutu 2� I cirakam � neyamutu � nāṭaṉmañcaḷ � ciraiteṅkāy I caṟkarai nilam I-la karuvāḻaippaḻam 1 tayi(r)ramutu n=ta Aṭaikkā(y)yaḻutu pākku 8
Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu � tirukkārttikaittirunāḷaikku Avalamutu 1� caṟkarai niṟai 10 3- la miḷakamutu 2� I cirakam 1� ciraiteṅkāy 5 Aṭaikkā(y)yamutu pākku 5 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu � tiruvamutukku po
ṉakappaḻa� ṅa paruppamutu niṟai 3 10 2- la Uppamutu n=ta miḷakamutu 2 � I cirakam va � nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �ma- la neyyamutu � ciraiteṅkāy I caṟkarai niṟai I-la tayi(r)ramutu � karuvāḻaippaḻam 1 Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 8
Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu � tiruviḷakkeṇṇai � Aiyppaci cataiyattirunāḷil tiruviti pārkka Eḻuntaruḷum tirunāḷ 1- kkum tiruppaṅkūṉi Uttirattirunāḷil tiruviti pārkka Eḻuntaruḷum tirunāḷ 1- kkum tiruvāṭittiruvātirait tirunāḷil tiru viti pā
rkka Eḻuntaruḷum tirunāḷ 1- kkum Āka tirunāḷ 3- kku poṉakappaḻa� 1� parup pamutu � kaṟiyamutu niṟai 100 9 10 2- la Uppamutu � miḷakamutu �-i cirakam nta � nāṭaṉmañcaḷ �-la ciraiteṅkāy 3 neyyamutu 3nta caṟkarai nilam 4 lai
karuvāḻaippaḻam 9 tayiramutu 3� Uppu Iñci � la Appamutukku poṉakappaḻa� 1- ḷa 1 ṅa caṟkarai niṟai 5 100 7 10 6- la neyyamutu 10 8 � miḷakamutu 2nta cirakam � I Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku 9 10 Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu 2kha tayilam 2 �
citāri 3� kku kūṭṭa cantaṉam �-la Akil �-la neriyāsam 7� teṉ � kaikkoṟṟup peṟuvāṟkku ḷ 1- kku Aṟsaṉai paṇṇuvān Oruvaṉukku ḷa ṅa4� puṭavaimutal kācu 1 I tirupparicārikaḷ 2- varkku ḷa 1 puṭavai mutal kācu 2
tirumaṭaippaḷḷikku viṟaku koṇṭu Iṭuvāṉukku ḷa ṅa tirumaṭaippaḷḷik kucavaṟkku I 4� vaṇṇattāṉukku I � poṉakappaḻa� peṟukki parupputteyppāḷukku I 4� koyiṟkaṇakkaṉukku I 4� puṭavaimutal kācu I Āka kācu 4 I2 10 1 � Itil
coṟu �-ṉāl I 1 � nikki kācu 4 I ṅa� tirumaṭaippaḷḷikku viṟaku koḷḷak kācu 4 śrīpātantāṅkuvāṟkum tiruppaḷḷittoṅkaluṭaiyārkaḷukkum I 10- ḷa .. śrīmat brahmapurīśavāgadhipatissvasvāmimitraśca ye tebhyo
hemasabhādhināthacaraṇannyāsol lasanmastakaḥ . prādāt bhūmi hiraṇyakam sarajatānna nyānḍanān sottamān śrīyārūradhipasya mūlavasatau devonapāyo nṛpaḥ ....1 lakṣmyālaye racitadharmmaparānupāla
śīlānnṛpāṅghrikamalāmcirasā namāmi . vyāghrāgra hāravarahemasabhānaṭeśapādāravindamadhupo [hyanapāya] nāmā ....2 Āḷuṭaiya nampi mātākkaḷ Icaiñāniyār ... jananī bhavato ñānaśivācārya kulebhavat .
śaive gautamagotresmin ñānyākhyā kamalāpure ....3
